items.name: Grandparents Dance Group
items.body: A welcoming dance group that gets together every week to move, laugh, and stay active.

items.name: Ballroom & Latin Dance Group
items.body: Our ballroom and Latin (cha-cha-cha) dance group with volunteer instructors that practises every week.

items.name: Fitness Exercise Group
items.body: The group offers weekly fitness sessions to improve strength, flexibility, and overall well-being.

items.name: Mahjong Group
items.body: A friendly Mahjong group for older seniors to enjoy recreation, social interaction, and companionship almost daily in a welcoming environment.
